import { Search } from 'lucide-react'; import OrderActions from '@/components/admin/OrderActions'; const API_URL = 'http://localhost:4000/api'; async function getOrders() { try { const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/orders`, { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!res.ok) return []; return await res.json(); } catch (e) { return []; } } export default async function AdminOrders() { const orders = await getOrders() || []; return (

Orders Management

{orders.map((order: any) => ( ))}
Order ID Date & Time Customer Total Status Payment Action
#ORD-{order.id.toString().padStart(3, '0')} {new Date(order.createdAt).toLocaleString()} {order.user?.name || 'Unknown'} ₹{order.total} {order.status} Paid
); }

import { Plus, Search, Edit, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'; const API_URL = 'http://localhost:4000/api'; async function getProducts() { try { const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/products`, { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!res.ok) return []; return await res.json(); } catch (e) { return []; } } export default async function AdminProducts() { const products = await getProducts() || []; return (

Products Management

{products.map((product: any) => ( ))}
Product Category Price Stock Status Actions
{product.name} {product.category?.name || 'Unknown'} ₹{product.price} {product.stockQuantity || 100} 10 ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-700 border border-green-200' : (product.stockQuantity || 100) > 0 ? 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border border-orange-200' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-700 border border-red-200' }`}> {(product.stockQuantity || 100) > 10 ? 'In Stock' : (product.stockQuantity || 100) > 0 ? 'Low Stock' : 'Out of Stock'}
); }

source:
import Image from 'next/image'; import { Leaf, History, Users, HeartHandshake } from 'lucide-react'; export default function KahaniPage() { return (
{/* Hero Section */}
Hamari Kahani

125 Years of
Shudhता

From a small chakki in Hisar to your kitchen, our journey is built on the unwavering foundation of purity and family trust.

{/* Story Sections */}
{/* The Beginning */}

The Beginning (1900)

It started with a simple belief: what we eat shapes who we are. Our great-grandfather set up the first stone chakki in the heart of Hisar, Haryana. He personally sourced the finest golden wheat from local farmers, ensuring that every grain was cleaned by hand before being cold-ground to preserve its nutritional essence.

{/* The Promise */}

The Promise of Purity

We never compromised on quality. Even as demand grew, we refused to adopt industrial methods that burn away nutrients. The "Shuddhata hi asli Shakti hai" (Purity is the real strength) motto became our guiding light. We guarantee that our atta is delivered within hours of milling—Aaj subah pisa, aaj shaam aapki rasoi mein (Milled this morning, in your kitchen by evening).

{/* The Family Today */}

A Family Tradition

Today, four generations later, we are still a family-run business. The faces have changed, but the hands that test the grain and the commitment to your family's health remain exactly the same. When you buy from Kiryana, you're not just a customer; you're joining our extended family table.

{/* Footer CTA */}

Taste the Difference of History

Experience the fresh, unadulterated goodness that has kept families coming back for over a century.

Shop Our Staples
); }

import Link from 'next/link'; import { Star, ShieldCheck, ThumbsUp, Sparkles, TrendingUp, ChefHat, ShoppingBag, Camera, HeartPulse, Flame, ChevronRight } from 'lucide-react'; // Use an absolute URL for server-side fetching const API_URL = 'http://localhost:4000/api'; async function getCategories() { try { const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/categories`, { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!res.ok) return []; return await res.json(); } catch (e) { return []; } } async function getProducts() { try { const res = await fetch(`${API_URL}/products`, { cache: 'no-store' }); if (!res.ok) return []; return await res.json(); } catch (e) { return []; } } export default async function Home() { const allCategories = await getCategories(); const allProducts = await getProducts(); // Map icons manually for now or use default const getIcon = (name: string) => { const icons: Record = { 'Rice & Atta': '🌾', 'Dairy': '🥛', 'Masale': '🌶️', 'Snacks': '🍪', 'Vegetables': '🥦' }; return icons[name] || '🛒'; }; // Limit to top 4 popular products const popularProducts = allProducts.slice(0, 4); return (
{/* Heritage Hero Section */}
Since 1900 • Hisar

Shuddhata hi asli
Shakti hai.

Aaj subah pisa atta. Aaj shaam aapki rasoi mein. Pure, fresh, and grounded in 125 years of family trust.

Explore Our Staples
{/* Guarantee Band */}

Fresh-ya-Free

Atta older than 7 days is on us.

Shuddhata Challenge

Find any impurity, get a reward.

Naram Roti Waapsi

100% return if not satisfied.

{/* Categories */}

Our Staples

View All
{allCategories.map((cat: any) => ( {getIcon(cat.name)} {cat.name} ))}
{/* Aaj Taaza Nikla (Popular) */}

Aaj Taaza Nikla

{popularProducts.map((prod: any) => (
{prod.rating || 4.5}

{prod.name}

{prod.description || 'Fresh Stock'}
₹{prod.price} {prod.oldPrice && ₹{prod.oldPrice}}
View Details
))}
{/* Smart Services */}

Smart Services

Reels → Recipe

Paste an Instagram/YouTube link. Recipe + groceries — ready.

Daily Essentials

Active • ₹79/day • no delivery fee

Ghar aur Mandir

Pooja kits + custom wizard — for daily aarti to Griha Pravesh.

Cook & Earn

Made a dish? Upload a pic. AI verifies. Coins come home.

Health-aware planner

Diabetic, PCOS, HTN or a routine — we plan monthly grocery + 7-day meals, science-backed.

Priest-on-Call

Certified pandit-ji at your doorstep for aarti to Griha Pravesh.

{/* Humari Kahani */}

Humari Kahani

It started in 1900 in the bustling lanes of Hisar, Haryana. Our great-grandfather set up a small chakki to provide pure, unadulterated wheat flour to the neighborhood.

Five generations later, our methods have scaled, but our promise remains exactly the same. We don't believe in 10-minute delivery if it compromises quality. We believe in fresh ingredients, processed with care, and delivered to your family's kitchen exactly when you need them.

125 Years of Family Trust.

); }

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

Back to Home

Priest-on-Call

Certified pandit-ji at your doorstep for any occasion.

{!submitted ? (
) : (

Request Received!

Pandit-ji's confirmation and details will be sent to your WhatsApp shortly.

Return to Homepage
)}

Failed to load analytics data.
; } const { metrics, salesTrend, orderStatusData, categoryData, topProducts } = data; const COLORS = ['#2D0B1C', '#C25E35', '#E3A83F', '#4A5D23', '#A67B5B']; return (

Orders by Status

`₹${val}`} /> [`₹${value}`, 'Revenue']} />

#{idx + 1}

{product.name}

₹{product.revenue.toLocaleString()}
